message:
fix: clippy lints across 7 files + audit batch 391 (25 FABRIC files, 0 bugs)

- hedge.rs: if+panic → assert!
- health.rs: suppress intentional dual-lock significant_drop_tightening
- dual_run.rs: ~50 lints (missing_docs, match→if-let, bool_to_int, must_use, redundant clone)
- debounce.rs: const thread_local, redundant closure
- websocket test: unused import, format string
- adversarial test: matching over (), unwrap_or_else, format string
- scope matrix test: single-element for loop
- audit_index.jsonl: batch 391 entries for 25 new FABRIC files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
